label: MES_products
info:
# Stilb MES environment
# 
ToDo:





 




/ - InputText Job (nella pagina Products) collegamento creato con la chiave esterna (job_id) 
/ - Dropdown Order (nella pagina Jobs) la tendina non funziona, legge i dati inseriti a mano ma non quelli sul database -> 
/ - I dropdown funzionano, non leggono però i valori selezionati dalla tabella; alcuni campi (come delivery_date e jobNumber) leggono i dati della tabella selezionati, gli altri campi no e ho messo le stesse funzionalità;
/ - Accertarsi funzionamento campo note in jobs
/ - Query editing/new/delete: le query funzionano sul database, su Node-red no
/ - Delivery date (pagina jobs): il database non accetta il formato troncato

name: AI_hook_jobs
AI_check_jobs_query
AI_eval_jobs
function_handle_jobs_page_open
query_first_job
func:
if (msg.payload !== "load_first_job") {
    return null;
}

msg.topic = `
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(jobs.delivery_date, '%d/%m/%Y') AS delivery_date,
        jobs.order_id,
        jobs.id AS id,
        orders.quantity,
        orders.reference,
        jobs.jobNumber,
        orders.\`order\` AS \`order\`,
        jobs.note,
        orders.part_number_id,
        orders.client_id
    FROM jobs
    JOIN orders ON jobs.order_id = orders.id
    ORDER BY jobs.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
`;

msg.payload = [];
return msg;

return msg;

/*msg.topic = `
SELECT

  o.reference     AS order_reference,
  o.\`order\`     AS order_number,
  pn.id           AS part_number_id,

JOIN \`clients\`   c  ON o.client_id      = c.id

if (msg.payload !== "load_table") {
  return null;
}

msg.topic = `
SELECT
  o.id            AS order_id,
  o.quantity      AS order_quantity,
  o.reference     AS order_reference,
  o.\`order\`      AS order_number,
  pn.id           AS part_number_id,
  pn.part_number  AS part_number,
  c.id            AS client_id,
  c.name          AS client_name,
  o.\`row\`        AS \`row\`,
  o.phase
FROM \`orders\` o
JOIN \`partNumber\` pn ON o.part_number_id = pn.id
JOIN \`clients\` c ON o.client_id = c.id
ORDER BY o.id ASC
`;

msg.payload = [];
return msg;

func:
if (msg.payload !== "load_first_order") {
    return null;
}

msg.topic = `
SELECT
  o.id            AS order_id,
  o.quantity      AS order_quantity,
  o.reference     AS order_reference,
  o.\`order\`      AS order_number,
  pn.id           AS part_number_id,
  pn.part_number  AS part_number,
  c.id            AS client_id,
  c.name          AS client_name,
  o.\`row\`        AS \`row\`,
  o.phase
FROM \`orders\` o
JOIN \`partNumber\` pn ON o.part_number_id = pn.id
JOIN \`clients\` c ON o.client_id = c.id
ORDER BY o.id DESC
LIMIT 1
`;

msg.payload = [];
return msg;

ANOM_start_scan_products
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT
    id,
    serial_number,
    part_number_id,
    batch_number,
    sw_version,
    job_id,
    validation
FROM products
ORDER BY id ASC;
`;
return msg;

name: ANOM_detect_products
ANOM_format_for_ai
ANOM_clear_table
func:
msg.topic = "DELETE FROM mes_anomalies;";
return msg;

name: ANOM_prepare_select_results
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT
    entity,
    entity_key,
    anomaly_code,
    severity,
    details,
    created_at
FROM mes_anomalies
ORDER BY
    CASE entity
        WHEN 'products' THEN 1
        WHEN 'jobs' THEN 2
        WHEN 'orders' THEN 3
        ELSE 4
    END,
    entity_key ASC,
    anomaly_code ASC;
`;
return msg;

name: ANOM_thinking_message
ANOM_start_scan_jobs
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT
    id,
    delivery_date,
    order_id,
    note,
    jobNumber
FROM jobs
ORDER BY id ASC;
`;
return msg;

name: ANOM_start_scan_orders
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT
    order_id AS id,
    part_number_id,
    quantity,
    reference,
    order_code AS \`order\`,
    client_id,
    \`row_number\` AS \`row\`,
    phase
FROM orders_ai
ORDER BY order_id ASC;
`;

msg.payload = [];
return msg;

format: body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; } .v-main { background: #f4f6f8; } .nrdb-ui-group .v-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d9e2ec; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .nrdb-ui-group .v-card-title { color: #1f4e79; font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; } .v-btn { background-color: #1f6feb !important; color: white !important; border-radius: 10px !important; } .v-field, .v-text-field, .v-select, .v-textarea { background: white; border-radius: 10px; } .v-toolbar { background: #1f4e79 !important; color: white !important; } a { color: #1f6feb; }
